emails.subject: Lunch
emails.body: Lunch I assume you and I are going to lunch tomorrow right before you go home to take a nap. Right???????

emails.subject: Lunch
emails.body: How about you serve me lunch in bed and sing me a lala bye before I start the night shift. Forwarded by Jay Blaine/HOU/EES on 06/04/2001 01:40 PM From: Chris Germany/ENRON@enronXgate on 06/04/2001 12:01 PM

emails.subject: RE: Lunch
emails.body: RE: Lunch I'll be right over wearing a cleaning lady skirt just for you.
